_note: Persona definitions for GratiFlow v2 synthetic user experiments (sequential generation, latent-skill-driven). All users are SYNTHETIC (LLM-generated). Parameters fixed before experiment execution per evaluation_protocol_v2.md Section 2.2 (the research team, 2026-06-04, PI-approved).

personas.label: 初心者・着実成長
personas.description: A university student who is a complete beginner in positive reframing. Learns steadily but not rapidly. Standard learner archetype.

personas.label: 初心者・停滞型
personas.description: A university student with low learning capacity. Struggles with reframing, and failure has a larger penalty. Prone to stagnation.

personas.label: 中級・安定成長
personas.description: A university student with some prior skill. Grows steadily. initial_skill lowered from v1's 0.3 to 0.15 to prevent ceiling effect. neg_tendency=1.0 maintained to ensure measurable SRR.

personas.label: 初心者・高応答型
personas.description: A university student who responds strongly to scaffolding. When they attempt reframing and succeed, they grow rapidly (high alpha). High responsiveness to practice opportunities.

personas.label: 中級・慎重型
personas.description: A university student with moderate prior skill but a cautious disposition. Transitions to self-directed reframing slowly. Gradual improvement trajectory.
